#### Registration License of a Foreign Company's Branch Please upload a Registration License of a Foreign Company's Branch ensuring that it has the following details:
    1. Official document issued by the competent registration authority: – *Federal Iraq*: Ministry of Trade – Companies Registration Department (Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: Ministry of Trade and Industry – General Directorate of Company Registration (Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, or Duhok) 2. Company Name (matched to Tax Document) 3. Signature from a Registrar Official 4. Stamp of Companies Registrar Office 5. Date 6. Nationality of the company 7. Office address in Iraq 8. Registration Number (as shown on the document)

### Certificate of Incorporation Please upload a Certificate of Incorporation ensuring that it has the following details:
    1. Official document issued by the competent Companies Registrar: – *Federal Iraq*: Ministry of Trade – Companies Registration Department (Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: Ministry of Trade and Industry – General Directorate of Company Registration (Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, or Duhok) 2. Name on the document (Supplier Legal Entity) 3. Certificate must be Valid 4. Company Incorporation Number 5. Incorporation Date

### Tax Card Please upload a Tax Card document ensuring that it has the following details:
    1. Tax Card issued by the relevant tax authority: – *Federal Iraq*: Ministry of Finance – General Commission for Taxes (GCT, Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: Ministry of Finance – General Directorate of Taxes (KRG) 2. Date - Must be valid

### Tax Clearance Certificate / No Objection Letter Please upload a Tax Clearance Certificate / No Objection Letter ensuring that it has the following details:
    1. Official document issued by the relevant tax authority: – *Federal Iraq*: General Commission for Taxes (GCT, Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: General Directorate of Taxes – Ministry of Finance (KRG) 2. Company Name (Must Match Legal Name on CoE. Can accept literal translation in English but must match all other documents containing the English name) 3. Can be addressed to client or the supplier company 4. Must evidence company's TIN 5. Must be signed by an authorized officer 6. Must be stamped by the issuing tax authority (GCT or KRG General Directorate of Taxes) 7. Dated and be the latest obtainable certificate
